Your Squig bounces on it's target dealing {COM_2_VAL0_DAMAGE}, and knocking them down for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
*TEST* With this tactic slotted, you will not auto attack at all.
AE Root
Silence and Disarm
You've been knocked down

Both you and your target are held tightly in place for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}, and neither one of you can move.
This effect can not be dispelled or broken.

Both you and your target are held tightly in place for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}, and neither one of you can move.
This effect can not be dispelled or broken.
All enemies within 30 feet are silenced for 7 seconds, making them unable to use magic.
All enemies within 30 feet are silenced for 7 seconds, making them unable to use magic.
All enemies within 30 feet become silenced and disarmed for 5 seconds, making them unable to use weapons or magic.
A powerful melee attack that makes your target unable to block, dodge, parry, or disrupt attacks for 10 seconds.
Your target and all other enemies within 30 feet of them suffer damage over 7 seconds, and are stunned.
A furious counterattack that deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and will knock your target down for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
You shatter the ground for {COM_0_RADI_FEET} around you, rooting up to four enemies in place for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}. There is a 50% chance of the root breaking with every hit.

You smash into your enemy, knocking them down for {COM_5_DURA_SECONDS}.

At 25 Grudges: Deals {COM_1_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
At 50 Grudges: Deals {COM_2_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS}.
At 75 Grudges: Deals {COM_3_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {COM_3_DURA_SECONDS}.
At 100 Grudges: Deals {COM_4_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {COM_4_DURA_SECONDS}.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to your target and roots them in place for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: Your Battle Squig explodes, causing you to be launched upward out of your Squiggy armor. All enemies within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} take {COM_3_VAL0_DAMAGE} and are knocked back.
Your Battle Squig explodes, causing you to be launched upward out of your Squiggy armor. All enemies within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} take {COM_3_VAL0_DAMAGE} and are knocked back.
Your Squig slams it's head in to it's target, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and knocking them back.
You've been knocked down
A mid-range attack that deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and knocks targeted player away. Monsters will be knocked down.
A focused blast that deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and knocks the targeted player away. Monsters will be knocked down.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to all enemies within {COM_0_RADI_FEET}, and knocks them away from you.
A close-range magical attack that deals heavy damage and knocks your target away.
A close-range magical attack that deals heavy damage and knocks your target away.
A dismissive strike that deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and knocks the enemy away.
A quick shot from the hip which deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE}.  This attack may be used at close range.
You lob a grenade that releases a powerful shockwave on impact, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE} to your target and knocking them back a short distance.  Monsters will be knocked down instead.

You call for air support, signaling for a strafing run which deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to all enemies in a line in front of you, up to {COM_0_RADI_FEET} away.  Any enemy players hit by the powerful shells will be sent flying away from you, while monsters will be knocked down.
Knockbacks targets within {COM_0_RADI_FEET} of you. Monsters will be knocked down.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to targets {COM_0_RADI_FEET} from you, and knocks them back.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to targets {COM_0_RADI_FEET} from you, and knocks them back.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE}. Reduces target's Weapon Skill by {COM_1_VAL0} for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE}. Reduces target's Weapon Skill by {COM_1_VAL0} for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0} undefendable damage. Target's physical damage done is reduced to {COM_1_VAL0}% for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
All enemies within {COM_0_RADI_FEET} become snared, reducing movement speed by {COM_0_VAL0}% for the next {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}. You are knocked back away from your enemies.

You blast back all enemies within {COM_0_RADI_FEET} of you, knocking them back a medium distance and snaring them by {COM_1_VAL0}% for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}. Monsters will be knocked down by the blast.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} to your target and all other enemies within {COM_0_RADI_FEET} of them, and knocks them backwards.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and knocks back all enemy targets within {COM_0_RADI_FEET} of your target.

SampleAbilities.AbilityName: VFX Anim Bug TEST for Nate

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: Stops your AP Regen. Fired from a standstill it will reduce your AP to half. Fired while moving forward will max your AP and fired while moving backwards will bottom it out. Casting this ability again on your self from a standstill will remove the effect.

Stops your AP Regen. Fired from a standstill it will reduce your AP to half. Fired while moving forward will max your AP and fired while moving backwards will bottom it out. Casting this ability again on your self from a standstill will remove the effect.

Stops your AP Regen. Fired from a standstill it will reduce your AP to half. Fired while moving forward will max your AP and fired while moving backwards will bottom it out. Casting this ability again on your self from a standstill will remove the effect.
So much AP! Regain 250 AP every 2 seconds.

You run away from the battle in a mad panic, increasing your run speed by {COM_0_VAL0} for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}. You immediately lose all of your action points, any career mechanic points, and your Morale will begin to drop, and you will not begin to regain action points until {COM_4_VAL0_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS} have passed.

You can use this ability again to cancel the effect early, but you will still remain panicked and will not regain action points for the full duration.
You will regain {COM_0_VAL0_ACTIONPOINTS} every second.

If an enemy dodges any of your attacks, you will regain {COM_1_VAL0_ACTIONPOINTS}.
This effect will not trigger more than once every 3 seconds.
You will regain 5 action points every second.
Whenever one of your spells hits an enemy, you have a 25% chance to regain {COM_1_VAL0_ACTIONPOINTS}. This effect can not occur more than once every {COM_2_VAL0_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Any time an enemy disrupts your attacks, you will regain 50 action points.
You will regain 5 action points every second.
Any time an enemy disrupts your attacks, you will regain 50 action points.
You stare down your opponent, draining {COM_0_VAL0} of their Action Points into yourself, and reducing their Strength by {COM_2_VAL0} for {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS}.
You stare down your opponent, draining {COM_0_VAL0} of their Action Points into yourself, and reducing their Strength by {COM_2_VAL0} for {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS}.
A prolonged fervor that grants {COM_0_VAL0_ACTIONPOINTS} a second to everyone in your group within 100 feet of you for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Steals up to 200 action points from your target and gives it to you, and reduces your target's Intelligence by {COM_2_VAL0} for 30 seconds.
Steals up to 200 action points from your target and gives it to you, and reduces your target's Intelligence by {COM_2_VAL0} for 30 seconds.
You will regain 5 action points every second.
Increases your group's armor and all resistances for 30 seconds, and restores 100 action points to everyone in the group.
Your damage is increased while near your active turret.
Your damage is increased while near your active horror.

Increases your Weapon Skill by {COM_0_VAL0} for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}. Each time you hit an enemy, your Oath Friend will gain {COM_2_VAL0_ACTIONPOINTS} as long as they're within {COM_2_RADI_FEET} of you.
You focus on your Grudges to ready yourself for action, restoring {COM_1_VAL0} AP.
Any time you critically hit an enemy, each group member within 100 feet will gain {COM_1_VAL0_ACTIONPOINTS}. This effect will not trigger more than once every 3 seconds.
Group members within 100 feet regain {COM_0_VAL0_TOD_HEALTH} and {COM_1_VAL0_TOD_ACTIONPOINTS} over {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Inscribes a Master rune into the ground for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}. Groupmates within the 100 feet of the Rune of Fury have a 20% chance to gain {COM_2_VAL0} AP whenever they activate an ability.
Healing abilities have a 25% chance to also increase your target's AP by {COM_1_VAL0}. This effect will not work on yourself.
Deal {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to target. Lower target's AP by {COM_1_VAL0}.
Heals your groupmates within 100 feet {COM_0_VAL0_TOD_HEALTH} over {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS} and gives {COM_1_VAL0_TOD_ACTIONPOINTS} over {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}

A mighty war cry that weakens your foes and gives you their strengths. All your melee attacks gain a 25% chance to randomly steal {ABIL_3232_COM_0_VAL0} stat points from targets within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} of you for {ABIL_3232_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}. During this time, both you and groupmates within 100 feet will benefit from the stolen stats.

You may only have 1 War Bellow active at a time.

A grand war cry to proclaim yourself da toughest! All your attacks gain a 25% chance to increase your wounds by {ABIL_3844_COM_0_VAL0} for {ABIL_3844_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}. You will be healed by the amount increased.

You may only have 1 War Bellow active at a time.

A Waaaghy bellow that raises resistances when hit. Incoming attacks have a 25% chance to increase resistance against that type of damage by {ABIL_3239_COM_0_VAL0} for {ABIL_3239_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS} on all group members within 100 feet. SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: Stops your AP Regen. Fired from a standstill it will reduce your AP to half. Fired while moving forward will max your AP and fired while moving backwards will bottom it out. Casting this ability again on your self from a standstill will remove the effect.
You have fled from combat and are not regaining action points.
Reduces the Intelligence and Willpower of all enemies within 30 feet for 10 seconds. Anyone afflicted by this effect will regain action points 50% more slowly.
For the next 7 seconds, your target regains action points 50% more slowly, and their normal morale gain will stop.
You regain action points {COM_0_VAL0}% faster for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
An encouraging bellow that causes group members within 100 feet to regenerate Action Points {COM_0_VAL0}% faster for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
AP regen is doubled
AP regen is doubled
AP regen is doubled
AP regen is doubled
AP regen is doubled
AP regen is doubled

SampleAbilities.AbilityName: RvRD - Martin - Tomb King - Build up attack

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: The power of your actions has granted you promise!  Use it to rid someone of their doubt!.

You begin quietly hunting for heretics, making it less likely that hostile monsters will notice you but slowly draining away your action points.  This effect will end if you use any abilities, run out of action points, or after 30 seconds has passed.
You quickly rake your target twice, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} with each hit.  The victim will regain action points {COM_2_VAL0}% more slowly for {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS}.
An inspired ferver fills your group, increasing AP regeneration by {COM_0_VAL0}% for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS} to all groupmates within 100 feet of you.

You prowl through the shadows for the next {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}, making it less likely that hostile monsters will notice you but slowly draining away your action points.  This effect will end if you use any abilities or run out of action points.
All enemies within {COM_0_RADI_FEET} instantly lose {COM_0_VAL0_ACTIONPOINTS}, and will regain action points {COM_1_VAL0}% more slowly for the next {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: Blasts the target with an armor-destroying round, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and reducing their Armor by {COM_1_VAL0} for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to the target, and reduces their armor by {COM_1_VAL0} for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
You deal {COM_0_VAL0}% more damage and all enemy monsters will hate you {COM_2_VAL1}% less than normal, but your armor is reduced by {COM_1_VAL0}%.
You deal 5% more damage, but your Toughness and Armor are reduced.
Your Toughness and Armor are increased, but you deal 5% less damage.
A powerful melee attack that reduces armor by {COM_1_VAL0} and deals {COM_0_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}
Increases your Armor by {COM_0_VAL0}.
Increases your group's armor and all resistances for 30 seconds, and restores 100 action points to everyone in the group.

A powerful attack that smashes through your enemy's protections, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and reducing their armor based on Grudges for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.

At 100 Grudges: Reduces armor by {COM_4_VAL0}.

Cooldown will begin when you lose control of your pet for any reason.

Reduces the autoattack speed of all enemies within {COM_0_RADI_FEET} by {COM_0_VAL1}% for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Pink Horror forces daemonic power into it's target, lowering the target's chance to critically hit by {COM_1_VAL1}% and dealing {COM_0_VAL0_TOD_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} over {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
The most super mega-awesome test ability ever made. EVAR!!!!

You cause your pet to explode, dealing {ABIL_15_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to enemies within {ABIL_15_COM_0_RADI_FEET}.  For the next {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS}, the next different squig other than the one that just exploded will be summoned instantly.
You eat your squig, gaining {COM_0_VAL0_HEALTH}. For the next {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS}, the next different squig other than the one that was just eaten will be summoned instantly.
Plink now builds up {COM_0_VAL0_SECONDS} faster, but the cost is increased by {COM_1_VAL1_ACTIONPOINTS}.
Your can now resurrect allies instantly, but you are stunned for {ABIL_1908_COM_5_DURA_SECONDS} after casting.
Reduces the build time of I'll Take That! by {COM_1_VAL0_SECONDS} but increases the cost by {COM_0_VAL1_ACTIONPOINTS}

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt:
You set up a device which unleashes a powerful wave of force, pulling up to six enemy players within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} inwards towards it and knocking down monsters. 1 second later, the device blasts outwards and snares all enemies within {COM_3_RADI_FEET}, reducing their movement speed by {COM_3_VAL0}% for {COM_3_DURA_SECONDS}.
The attack uses the Ranged statistic.

You frantically lash out at everything nearby for up to {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}, dealing {COM_1_VAL0_DAMAGE} every 2 seconds to all enemies within {COM_1_RADI_FEET}. Each time you deal damage, you'll randomly pull one of the victims in towards you.
Extends a tendril of energy to pull an opposing player towards you. Monster targets will be dragged to the ground.

A rift in the warp is opened briefly, pulling up to six enemy players within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} of the vortex towards it's center and then snaring everyone within {COM_4_RADI_FEET} a second later by {COM_4_VAL0}% for {COM_4_DURA_SECONDS}. Monsters will be knocked down by the initial pull.
You magically leap through the air towards your target.  When you land, all enemies around you will become snared for 10 seconds, reducing their run speed by 60%.
You command your War Lion to toss its target through the air, knocking them closer to you.
You pounce forwards, leaping towards your target and causing {COM_2_VAL0_DAMAGE} when you land.
Pulls your target to you.
A swift dismount that will hurl you to the targeted location within the area of a Keep. If used outside of the area of a Keep your mount will rear in disapproval and buck you off.
Removes any currently active roots and snares, and increases your speed by {COM_6_VAL0}%. If a Friendly Rat Ogre is within {COM_7_RADI_FEET}, you will leap to his location.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: All of your abilities will cost 25% fewer action points, cool down 50% faster, and deal 20% more damage for 7 seconds.
A furious counterattack that deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and will knock your target down for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.

You brutally crush all enemies within {COM_0_RADI_FEET}, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE}. Your merciless display of savagery intimidates your enemy, increasing their cooldown timers by 5 seconds for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
Cooldowns on your Exhaustive Attacks are reduced by {COM_0_VAL0}%.
While you are in the Berserk state, all of your cooldowns are reduced by 5 seconds.
Cooldown on Rune of Cleansing is removed and the cost increased to 40 Action Points.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: A powerful attack that deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and reduces the threat generated by your pet's next attack.
You force your Battle Squig to claw at your target, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS} and snaring them by {COM_1_VAL0}% over {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
You cause your Battle Squig to bounce, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and knocking your target down for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Battle Squig explodes, causing you to be launched upward out of your Squiggy armor. All enemies within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} take {COM_3_VAL0_DAMAGE} and are knocked back.
Your Squig bounces on it's target dealing {COM_2_VAL0_DAMAGE}, and knocking them down for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Squig flings deadly spines at it's target, dealing {COM_1_VAL0_DAMAGE} every second for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Squig injects a deadly poison in to it's target, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS} and reducing their chance to critically hit by  {COM_1_VAL1}% for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Squig gores its target, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and an additional {ABIL_3881_COM_0_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {ABIL_3881_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Squig slams it's head in to it's target, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and knocking them back.
Your Squig sprays out corrosive slime towards an enemy, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to all targets within {COM_0_RADI_FEET} of the victim.

Your Squig expels noxious spores towards an enemy, briefly sickening the victim and all other enemies within {COM_0_RADI_FEET} of them, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE}. Any of your Squigs, including your Battle Squig, within the radius will be healed for {COM_1_VAL0_HEALTH}.

A grating squeal that Taunts the enemy, making the enemy hate your pet much more, forcing monsters to attack your pet, and causing the enemy to deal {COM_0_VAL0}% less damage to everyone else other than the Squig for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Blasts the target with an armor-destroying round, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and reducing their Armor by {COM_1_VAL0} for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
Fires a rapid series of shots at the target for up to {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}, repeatedly dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} twice per second.
Fires a compact shot directly at the target which deals {COM_0_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE}.
Launches a grenade packed with explosives at the target, dealing {COM_1_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE} to the victim and all enemies within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} of them.
Releases a searing gout of flame, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to all targets in front of the Turret up to {COM_0_RADI_FEET} away.
Opens the Turret's safety-release valves for up to {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}, repeatedly dealing  {COM_1_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE} every {COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} to all targets within {COM_1_RADI_FEET}.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to the target.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to all enemies in front of your War Lion, up to {COM_0_RADI_FEET} away.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to the target, and reduces their armor by {COM_1_VAL0} for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} to the target over {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}. For the first {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}, the target will be snared, reducing their movement speed by {COM_1_VAL0}%.
Strikes the target 2 times, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} with each hit.
Strikes the target 2 times, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} with each hit.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to the target.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to the target, and an additional {COM_1_VAL0_COM_0_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {COM_1_VAL0_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.

Your Pink Horror flings daemonic fire at it's target, burning them for {ABIL_54_COM_0_VAL0_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} and reducing Elemental Resistance by {ABIL_54_COM_1_VAL0} for the next {ABIL_54_COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Pink Horror forces daemonic power into it's target, lowering the target's chance to critically hit by {COM_1_VAL1}% and dealing {COM_0_VAL0_TOD_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} over {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Blue Horror spews out a cone of daemonic energy that inflicts {COM_0_VAL0_SPIRITDAMAGE} to targets up to {COM_0_RADI_FEET} in front of Horror.
Your Blue Horror releases a field of energy dealing {COM_1_VAL0_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} every second to all targets within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Flamer focuses two gouts of flame on it's target dealing {COM_1_VAL0_SPIRITDAMAGE} every {COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Flamer hurls a gout of daemonic fire that will strike it's target and those {COM_0_RADI_FEET} around them, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_TOD_SPIRITDAMAGE} over {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Firewyrm slashes across all those it's it's path, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} to all targets within {COM_0_RADI_FEET} in front the Firewyrm.
Your Firewyrm spews fourth a great wave of chaos, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} to all targets within {COM_0_RADI_FEET}.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: A grating squeal that Taunts the enemy, making the enemy hate your pet much more, forcing monsters to attack your pet, and causing the enemy to deal {COM_0_VAL0}% less damage to everyone else other than the Squig for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.

Your Lion roars and taunts an enemy, making the enemy hate your pet much more, forcing monsters to target your pet,  and causing the enemy to deal {COM_0_VAL0}% less damage to everyone else other than your Lion for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
You deal {COM_0_VAL0}% more damage and all enemy monsters will hate you {COM_2_VAL1}% less than normal, but your armor is reduced by {COM_1_VAL0}%.

This effect will end if you break your concentration, or run out of action points.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: You cause your Battle Squig to bounce, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and knocking your target down for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Battle Squig explodes, causing you to be launched upward out of your Squiggy armor. All enemies within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} take {COM_3_VAL0_DAMAGE} and are knocked back.
Your Squig flings deadly spines at it's target, dealing {COM_1_VAL0_DAMAGE} every second for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.

Your Squig expels noxious spores towards an enemy, briefly sickening the victim and all other enemies within {COM_0_RADI_FEET} of them, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE}. Any of your Squigs, including your Battle Squig, within the radius will be healed for {COM_1_VAL0_HEALTH}.

A grating squeal that Taunts the enemy, making the enemy hate your pet much more, forcing monsters to attack your pet, and causing the enemy to deal {COM_0_VAL0}% less damage to everyone else other than the Squig for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Launches a grenade packed with explosives at the target, dealing {COM_1_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE} to the victim and all enemies within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} of them.
Releases a searing gout of flame, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to all targets in front of the Turret up to {COM_0_RADI_FEET} away.
Opens the Turret's safety-release valves for up to {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}, repeatedly dealing  {COM_1_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE} every {COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} to all targets within {COM_1_RADI_FEET}.

Your Lion roars and taunts an enemy, making the enemy hate your pet much more, forcing monsters to target your pet,  and causing the enemy to deal {COM_0_VAL0}% less damage to everyone else other than your Lion for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Blue Horror spews out a cone of daemonic energy that inflicts {COM_0_VAL0_SPIRITDAMAGE} to targets up to {COM_0_RADI_FEET} in front of Horror.
Your Blue Horror releases a field of energy dealing {COM_1_VAL0_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} every second to all targets within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Blue Horror releases a field of energy dealing {COM_1_VAL0_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} every second to all targets within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Flamer focuses two gouts of flame on it's target dealing {COM_1_VAL0_SPIRITDAMAGE} every {COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Firewyrm slashes across all those it's it's path, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} to all targets within {COM_0_RADI_FEET} in front the Firewyrm.
Your Firewyrm spews fourth a great wave of chaos, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} to all targets within {COM_0_RADI_FEET}.

This effect will not trigger more than once every 3 seconds.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: You construct a turret with a self-aiming gun which will fire at distant enemies. The turret gains 75% of your Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill from item bonuses and 50% of your Wounds from item bonuses. While you are within {ABIL_1069_COM_1_RADI_FEET} of the turret you will scavenge extra parts from the turret to create improvised upgrades for your weapons, increasing your damage by {ABIL_1070_COM_0_VAL0}% every {ABIL_1069_COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} to a maximum of {ABIL_1070_COM_0_VAL1}%.

Increases targeted group member's Resists by {COM_0_VAL0} for 1 hour. The rune holder may activate it to inflict {ABIL_3868_COM_0_VAL0_TOD_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} over {ABIL_3868_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS} to all targets within {ABIL_3868_COM_0_RADI_FEET}.
You may only give a player one Oath Rune, but players may bear multiple Oath Runes of different types at the same time.

You may only give a player one Oath Rune, but players may bear multiple Oath Runes of different types at the same time.

You may only give a player one Oath Rune, but players may bear multiple Oath Runes of different types at the same time.

You may only give a player one Oath Rune, but players may bear multiple Oath Runes of different types at the same time.

Summons a basic squig pet which you can order around. This pet is very tough, and can take quite beating.
This pet receives a bonuses to Toughness and Wounds equal to your bonus from items.
This squig generates much more hatred in enemy monsters than normal.
Cooldown will begin when you lose control of your pet for any reason.

Summons a basic squig pet which you can order around. This pet is very tough, and can take quite beating.
This pet receives a bonuses to Toughness and Wounds equal to your bonus from items.
This squig generates much more hatred in enemy monsters than normal.
Cooldown will begin when you lose control of your pet for any reason.

Summons a Horned squig pet which you can order around. This pet deals more damage than a basic squig. It is strong against physical attacks, but weak against magic.
This pet receives a bonus to Strength equal to your bonus from items. This pet receives a bonus to Toughness and Wounds that is 50% of your bonus from items.
Your range is increased by {COM_2_VAL1}% as long as this squig is alive.
Cooldown will begin when you lose control of your pet for any reason.

Summons a Gas squig pet which you can order around. This pet attacks from range, but is very weak to attacks.
This pet receives a bonus to Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill equal to your bonus from items.
Your armor is increased by the amount of armor gained from items as long as your Squig is alive.
Cooldown will begin when you lose control of your pet for any reason.

Summons a Spiked squig pet which you can order around. This pet attacks from range and has increased damage.
This pet receives a bonus to Ballistic Skill equal to 150% of your bonus from items. This pet receives a bonus to Weapon Skill equal to 50% of your bonus from items.
You gain the ability to autoattack while moving, and your chance to critically hit is increased by {COM_2_VAL1}% as long as this squig is alive.
Cooldown will begin when you lose control of your pet for any reason.

You train your pet to fight ferociously, increasing its Strength and Weapon Skill by your Strength and Weapon Skill gained from items and increasing your Toughness by {COM_2_VAL0}.

Your War Lion will gain the ability to strike its enemies with a powerful mauling attack, the ability to attack its target repeatedly, and the ability to deal damage over time.

You train your pet to behave menacingly, increasing its Toughness and Wounds by your Toughness and Wounds gained from items and increasing your chance to critically hit by {COM_2_VAL1}% as long as you are at your target's sides or back.

Your War Lion will gain the ability to threaten its enemies, the ability to reduce a foe's armor, and the ability to snare its enemies.

You train your pet to hunt with you, increasing its Strength, Toughness, Wounds, and Weapon Skill by 50% of your bonus gained from items. Any time either you or your War Lion strikes an enemy, there is a 10% chance that you will deal an additional {COM_4_VAL0_COM_0_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {COM_4_VAL0_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.

Your War Lion will gain the ability to bite its enemies, the ability to claw at multiple foes, and the ability to reduce several enemies' autoattack speeds.

All of your attacks will cause your enemy to hate you 5% less than normal.  This has no effect on enemy players.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: Your Squig expels noxious spores towards an enemy, briefly sickening the victim and all other enemies within {COM_0_RADI_FEET} of them, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE}. Any of your Squigs, including your Battle Squig, within the radius will be healed for {COM_1_VAL0_HEALTH}.

Your Squig expels noxious spores towards an enemy, briefly sickening the victim and all other enemies within {COM_0_RADI_FEET} of them, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE}. Any of your Squigs, including your Battle Squig, within the radius will be healed for {COM_1_VAL0_HEALTH}.

Chaotic energy protects you for 10 seconds.  Each time an enemy hits you, there is a 33% chance that you will drain an equal amount of health from any random enemy within 30 feet.
Instantly restores a massive amount of hit points.
You form a bond with an ally for 7 seconds.  Each time you suffer damage, they become healed for the same amount.

You begin to constantly complain about everything that's wrong today, telling everyone how much better things were back in the old days. You feel much better for the chance to grumble, and regain {COM_0_VAL0_HEALTH} every 3 seconds for up to {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}. You lose {COM_1_VAL1} Grudge each time this happens, and the effect will end if you run out of Grudges.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: A grating squeal that Taunts the enemy, making the enemy hate your pet much more, forcing monsters to attack your pet, and causing the enemy to deal {COM_0_VAL0}% less damage to everyone else other than the Squig for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.

Your Lion roars and taunts an enemy, making the enemy hate your pet much more, forcing monsters to target your pet,  and causing the enemy to deal {COM_0_VAL0}% less damage to everyone else other than your Lion for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
All enemies within 30 feet are silenced for 7 seconds, making them unable to use magic.
All enemies within 30 feet are silenced for 7 seconds, making them unable to use magic.
All enemies within 30 feet become silenced and disarmed for 5 seconds, making them unable to use weapons or magic.

You enrage your opponent, interrupting any currently building abilities and forcing monsters to attack you. While taunted your opponent will take {COM_3_VAL0}% more damage from your attacks. This effect will fade after {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS} or after your opponent has hit you 3 times.

You toss a grenade which explodes with a burst of force, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE} to the target.  The blinding flash interrupts the victim and all enemies within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} of them.
A well-aimed shot which deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and disarms your target for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}, making them unable to use their weapons.
Silences and wounds target for {COM_0_VAL0_TOD_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} over {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.

You enrage your opponent, interrupting any currently building abilities and forcing monsters to attack you. While taunted your opponent will take {COM_3_VAL0}% more damage from your attacks. This effect will fade after {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS} or after your opponent has hit you 3 times.
Deals {COM_1_VAL0_DAMAGE}. Silences target for {COM_3_DURA_SECONDS}.
All targets within {COM_0_RADI_FEET} of you take {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and are Silenced, unable to use Magic for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
On the Squig's next attack, it will deal an additional {COM_1_VAL0_DAMAGE} and disarm your target for {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS}, making them unable to use melee or ranged weapons.
You lash out at your target, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and interrupting any ability that they are building up.
A Crippling shot that deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and silences your target for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}, making them unable to use magic.
Silenced
Disarmed
You are Dis-Armed!

You slice deeply into your enemy, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to the enemy and interrupting any abilities that they are building up.  The victim will also suffer an additional {COM_2_VAL0_COM_0_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {COM_2_VAL0_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.

You slice deeply into your enemy, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to the enemy and interrupting any abilities that they are building up.  The victim will also suffer an additional {COM_2_VAL0_COM_0_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {COM_2_VAL0_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.

You enrage your opponent, interrupting any currently building abilities and forcing monsters to attack you. While taunted your opponent will take {COM_3_VAL0}% more damage from your attacks. This effect will fade after {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS} or after your opponent has hit you 3 times.
A savage counterattack that deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and disarms your target for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}, making them unable to use their weapons.
A punishing blow that silences your target, making them unable to use magic for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.  If you are behind your target, then you will also deal {COM_2_VAL0_DAMAGE}.

A Hex which turns the air into unbreathable smoke and ash, dealing {COM_2_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE} to your target.  The target and all other enemies within {COM_3_RADI_FEET} become silenced for {COM_3_DURA_SECONDS}, making them unable to use magic.

You repeatedly assault an enemy, attacking their very spirit and offering it up to Sigmar's will. You strike the target up to four times over {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}, dealing {COM_2_VAL0_SPIRITDAMAGE} per hit. Each hit heals your defensive target for 350% of the damage that was dealt.
This effect will end if you break your concentration, or run out of Righteous Fury.

You repeatedly assault an enemy, attacking their very spirit and offering it up to Sigmar's will. You strike the target up to four times over {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}, dealing {COM_2_VAL0_SPIRITDAMAGE} per hit. Each hit heals your defensive target for 350% of the damage that was dealt.
This effect will end if you break your concentration, or run out of Righteous Fury.
A powerful strike which deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to your enemy and knocks the wind out of them for {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}, Silencing them and making them unable to use magic.

You open your soul to Sigmar and become a living force of holy power for up to {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}, as long as you maintain your concentration. Each second, all allies within {COM_2_RADI_FEET} of you will regain {COM_2_VAL0_HEALTH}, and you will consume {COM_1_VAL1} Righteous Fury.
This effect will end if you lose your concentration or if you run out of Righteous Fury.

You enrage your opponent, interrupting any currently building abilities and forcing monsters to attack you. While taunted your opponent will take {COM_3_VAL0}% more damage from your attacks. This effect will fade after {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS} or after your opponent has hit you 3 times.
Tzeentch's dark words pour from your mouth, interrupting any spells being cast {COM_0_RADI_FEET} in front of you, and inflicting {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to all in range.
Disarms your target for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}, making them unable to use melee or ranged weapons.

A surge of chaotic bliss overcomes your target, dealing {COM_0_VAL0_SPIRITDAMAGE}.  The victim and any other enemies within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} of them are also interruped, cancelling any abilities that they are building up.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: You construct a turret with a self-aiming gun which will fire at distant enemies. The turret gains 75% of your Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill from item bonuses and 50% of your Wounds from item bonuses. While you are within {ABIL_1069_COM_1_RADI_FEET} of the turret you will scavenge extra parts from the turret to create improvised upgrades for your weapons, increasing your damage by {ABIL_1070_COM_0_VAL0}% every {ABIL_1069_COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} to a maximum of {ABIL_1070_COM_0_VAL1}%.

You construct a turret with an auto-firing grenade launcher which will attack enemies at a moderate range.  The turret gains 100% of your Ballistic Skill, 30% of your Weapon Skill, and 70% of your Wounds from item bonuses. While you are within {ABIL_1069_COM_1_RADI_FEET} of the turret you will scavenge extra parts from the turret to create improvised upgrades for your weapons, increasing your damage by {ABIL_1070_COM_0_VAL0}% every {ABIL_1069_COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} to a maximum of {ABIL_1070_COM_0_VAL1}%.

You fling out a land mine which arms itself immediately and persists for up to {COM_0_DURA_MINUTES}.  The mine will detonate when an enemy gets too close, dealing {ABIL_31_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to all enemies within {COM_2_RADI_FEET} and staggering them for up to {ABIL_31_COM_2_VAL0_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}, preventing all actions unless they are damaged.

You construct a turret with a self-firing flamethrower which will attack enemies at close range.  The turret gains 100% of your Ballistic Skill, 10% of your Weapon Skill, and 90% of your Wounds from item bonuses. While you are within {ABIL_1069_COM_1_RADI_FEET} of the turret you will scavenge extra parts from the turret to create improvised upgrades for your weapons, increasing your damage by {ABIL_1070_COM_0_VAL0}% every {ABIL_1069_COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} to a maximum of {ABIL_1070_COM_0_VAL1}%.

You deploy a shock rod at your feet which will remain for up to {COM_4_DURA_SECONDS} and periodically blast out with waves of power, dealing {COM_2_VAL0_COM_0_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE} every {COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} to all enemies within {COM_2_RADI_FEET} of it.

You carefully unpack a mini-keg of rare and precious Bugman's Finest Stout with reverential awe. For the next {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}, the faint vapors escaping from the keg will rejuvenate any allies within {COM_3_RADI_FEET} of it, restoring {COM_3_VAL0_COM_0_VAL0_HEALTH} every {COM_2_FREQ_SECONDS}. You dream of the day that the brew will be aged enough to actually tap and drink.

Summons a basic squig pet which you can order around. This pet is very tough, and can take quite beating.
This pet receives a bonuses to Toughness and Wounds equal to your bonus from items.
This squig generates much more hatred in enemy monsters than normal.
Cooldown will begin when you lose control of your pet for any reason.

Summons a Horned squig pet which you can order around. This pet deals more damage than a basic squig. It is strong against physical attacks, but weak against magic.
This pet receives a bonus to Strength equal to your bonus from items. This pet receives a bonus to Toughness and Wounds that is 50% of your bonus from items.
Your range is increased by {COM_2_VAL1}% as long as this squig is alive.
Cooldown will begin when you lose control of your pet for any reason.

Summons a Gas squig pet which you can order around. This pet attacks from range, but is very weak to attacks.
This pet receives a bonus to Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill equal to your bonus from items.
Your armor is increased by the amount of armor gained from items as long as your Squig is alive.
Cooldown will begin when you lose control of your pet for any reason.

Summons a Spiked squig pet which you can order around. This pet attacks from range and has increased damage.
This pet receives a bonus to Ballistic Skill equal to 150% of your bonus from items. This pet receives a bonus to Weapon Skill equal to 50% of your bonus from items.
You gain the ability to autoattack while moving, and your chance to critically hit is increased by {COM_2_VAL1}% as long as this squig is alive.
Cooldown will begin when you lose control of your pet for any reason.

Summons a daemonic minion who specializes in long range Elemental based attacks. This minion is confined to its summoning circle and cannot move. The daemonic minion gains 100% of your Intelligence from item bonuses and 50% of your Wounds from item bonuses. While you are within {ABIL_1071_COM_1_RADI_FEET} of the turret you will be steadily empowered by its unholy energy, increasing your damage by {ABIL_1072_COM_0_VAL0}% every {ABIL_1071_COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} to a maximum of {ABIL_1072_COM_0_VAL1}%.

Summons a daemonic minion who specializes in short range Spiritual and Elemental area of effect attacks. This minion is confined to its summoning circle and cannot move. The daemonic minion gains 50% of your Intelligence from item bonuses and 100% of your Wounds from item bonuses. While you are within {ABIL_1071_COM_1_RADI_FEET} of the turret you will be steadily empowered by its unholy energy, increasing your damage by {ABIL_1072_COM_0_VAL0}% every {ABIL_1071_COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} to a maximum of {ABIL_1072_COM_0_VAL1}%.

Summons a daemonic minion who specializes in powerful moderate range Spiritual attacks. This minion is confined to its summoning circle and cannot move. The daemonic minion gains 75% of your Intelligence from item bonuses and 75% of your Wounds from item bonuses. While you are within {ABIL_1071_COM_1_RADI_FEET} of the turret you will be steadily empowered by its unholy energy, increasing your damage by {ABIL_1072_COM_0_VAL0}% every {ABIL_1071_COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} to a maximum of {ABIL_1072_COM_0_VAL1}%.
Summons a mighty Firewyrm that will rampage around attacking your enemies for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.

You call fourth a small daemon which will persist in an area for 1 minute. The daemon will explode when an enemy gets too close dealing {ABIL_383_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to all enemies within {COM_2_RADI_FEET} and staggering them for {ABIL_3167_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}, preventing all actions until they take damage.

You call your tamed War Lion to come forth and fight with you.
You may only have a single War Lion at a time.

You call your tamed War Lion to come forth and fight with you.
You may only have a single War Lion at a time.

You call your tamed War Lion to come forth and fight with you.
You may only have a single War Lion at a time.

The very essence of Amenemhetum's Protector! Using this elixir will cause the spirit of Amenemhetum's Protector to appear and attack your enemies for the next {COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt:
You run away from the battle in a mad panic, increasing your run speed by {COM_0_VAL0} for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}. You immediately lose all of your action points, any career mechanic points, and your Morale will begin to drop, and you will not begin to regain action points until {COM_4_VAL0_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS} have passed.

You can use this ability again to cancel the effect early, but you will still remain panicked and will not regain action points for the full duration.
Deals high damage to all enemies in front of you, up to 65 feet away, and greatly reduces their Morale over 3 seconds.
Everyone in your group gains 50 seconds worth of Morale, and all enemies within 65 feet of you lose 50 seconds worth of Morale.
Everyone in your group gains 50 seconds worth of Morale, and all enemies within 65 feet of you lose 50 seconds worth of Morale.
Your target and any other enemies within 30 feet of them suffer very high damage and lose 50 seconds worth of Morale.
All enemies within 30 feet lose 30 seconds worth of Morale.
Slashes for {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE}, and generates extra hate against monsters.
Whenever you Block an attack you gain 4 percentage points worth of Morale. This effect will not trigger more than once every 3 seconds.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS} to all targets within {COM_0_RADI_FEET} in of you.  Affected targets lose 30 seconds of Morale over 12 seconds.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} to your target.
Everyone in your group within 100 feet will do an additional {COM_1_VAL0_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} on their next attack within {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Everyone in your group within 100 feet will do an additional {COM_1_VAL0_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} on their next attack within {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.

SampleAbilities.AbilityName: Auto 2 (he fell arrow proj) - Cold Feet Icon (Root)

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: Deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to all enemies within {COM_0_RADI_FEET}.  Enemy players hit by this effect will lose all of their Morale.
Any time you strike an enemy in the back, there is a 25% chance that they will lose {COM_1_VAL0} points of Morale.
Any time you critically hit an enemy with a direct damage ability, you will gain {COM_1_VAL0} points of Morale. This effect will not trigger more than once every 3 seconds.
Deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to your target, and {COM_1_VAL0} to all other enemies within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} of them.  All enemies hit by this effect will lose {COM_2_VAL0} points of Morale.
Any time you block an attack, you gain {COM_1_VAL0} points of Morale. Tactic can not trigger more than once every 3 seconds.
While you are using the Gift Of Monstrosity, all of your hits have a 25% chance to remove {COM_1_VAL0} points of Morale from the enemy.
Critical direct heals will increase your morale by {COM_1_VAL0}. This effect will not trigger more than once every 3 seconds.
An overpowering strike that deals {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and decreases your opponent's morale by {COM_1_VAL0}.
All enemies within 30 feet suffer {COM_0_VAL0_TOD} Spiritual damage over 12 seconds, and will steadily lose {COM_1_VAL0_TOD} Morale.
You gain an additional {COM_1_VAL0} Morale every {COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} as long as you have an active War Lion.  If your War Lion ever dies, however, you will lose {COM_3_VAL0} Morale.
You gain an additional {COM_1_VAL0} Morale every {COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} as long as you have an active War Lion.  If your War Lion ever dies, however, you will lose {COM_3_VAL0} Morale.

Heals your target for {COM_0_VAL0_HEALTH}.
This is a fragile spell, and will sometimes be set back by a small amount if you are damaged while casting it.
Any time you critically hit an enemy with a direct damage ability, you will gain {COM_1_VAL0} points of Morale. This effect will not trigger more than once every 3 seconds.
Doubt - On Being Hit: 25% chance to remove {ABIL_10390_COM_1_VAL0} morale from the attacker.
Determination - On Being Hit: 10% chance to gain {ABIL_10394_COM_1_VAL0} morale.
Increases your Morale by 10%.
Increases your Morale by 20%.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt:
You run away from the battle in a mad panic, increasing your run speed by {COM_0_VAL0} for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}. You immediately lose all of your action points, any career mechanic points, and your Morale will begin to drop, and you will not begin to regain action points until {COM_4_VAL0_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS} have passed.

You can use this ability again to cancel the effect early, but you will still remain panicked and will not regain action points for the full duration.
For the next 7 seconds, your target regains action points 50% more slowly, and their normal morale gain will stop.

SampleAbilities.AbilityName: RvRD - Martin - Tomb King - Build up attack

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: Victim is overcome with seemingly endless visions of their own grisly death. So real are the visions, that the victim suffers {COM_0_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS} and will not generate any morale for every second of agony.
You receive an additional 5% morale gain for every Dwarf in your group.
You receive an additional 5% morale gain for every Greenskin in your group.
You receive an additional 5% morale gain for every Greenskin in your group.
You receive an additional 5% morale gain for every Empire in your group.
You receive an additional 5% morale gain for every Chaos in your group.
You receive an additional 5% morale gain for every High Elf in your group.
You receive an additional 5% morale gain for every Dark Elf in your group.

You deal {COM_0_VAL0}% more damage to all enemy Daemon monsters, and take {COM_0_VAL0}% less damage from them.  As long as you are attacking an enemy of this type, you gain Morale {COM_3_VAL0}% faster.

Increases your chances to defend against attacks made by enemy Ogre, Troll, and Giant monsters by {COM_0_VAL0}%, and increases your chance to critically hit them by {COM_1_VAL1}%.  As long as you are attacking an enemy of this type, you gain Morale {COM_3_VAL0}% faster.

You can approach {COM_0_VAL1}% closer to an enemy Greenskin monster before it will attack you, and any abilities used against them will cost {COM_1_VAL1}% less action points.  As long as you are attacking an enemy of this type, you gain Morale {COM_3_VAL0}% faster.
I blockz yer Morale and stuffz

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: You will become your ally's apprentice.
Your ally will become your Hireling.

Increases the effective level of the targeted player to two levels below your level as long as they are within 100 feet of you.
You may toggle this on and off to change which ally you are helping.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: Resurrects all groupmates within {COM_1_RADI_FEET}. Anyone who is brought back from the dead will also be healed for {ABIL_3884_COM_0_VAL0_TOD} over {ABIL_3884_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}, and they will deal {ABIL_3876_COM_0_VAL0}% more damage for {ABIL_3876_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Resurrect target friendly dead player and restore 20% of their health.

Increases targeted group member's Toughness by {COM_5_VAL0} for 1 hour. The rune holder will then be able to resurrect themselves with 20% health if killed within the next 10 minutes. Doing so will remove the Oath Rune.
You may only give a player one Oath Rune, but players may bear multiple Oath Runes of different types at the same time.
Resurrects all fallen groupmembers within {COM_0_RADI_FEET}, and does not cause Resurrection Sickness.  Anyone resurrected by this effect will regain 50% of their hit points.
Resurrects your target with 20% health.
Resurrects a fallen ally with 20% health.
Tzeentch dislikes losing a pawn so soon. Your target is resurrected with 20% health so that Tzeentch may continue his game.

The groupmember bearing this Mark can resurrect themselves if killed in the next 10 minutes. In addition, the bearer's Toughness is increased by {COM_5_VAL0} for 1 hour.
You may only give a player one Mark, but players may bear multiple Marks of different types at the same time.
Resurrects your target with 20% health.
Life is restored to a dead ally, and 20% of their health is recovered in the hopes they will prove less worthless to you in the future.
Drinking this hearty draught gives you a thirst for life, and if killed in next {COM_0_DURA_MINUTES}, you will be able to ressurect with 10% of your total health.
Drinking this hearty draught gives you a thirst for life, and if killed in next {COM_0_DURA_MINUTES}, you will be able to ressurect with 50% of your total health.
You restore life to a fallen ally, resurrecting them with 100% hit points.
A powerful potion that ressurects your fallen friends with {COM_1_VAL0}% of their total health.
Offers resurrection to up to 6 allies within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} of your location. Allies rise at the location of their corpse, and at full health.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: Blasts the target with an armor-destroying round, dealing {ABIL_21_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and reducing their Armor by {ABIL_21_COM_1_VAL0} for {ABIL_21_COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
Fires a rapid series of shots at the target for up to {ABIL_22_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}, repeatedly dealing {ABIL_22_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} twice per second.
Fires a compact shot directly at the target which deals {ABIL_24_COM_0_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE}.
Launches a grenade packed with explosives at the target, dealing {ABIL_25_COM_1_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE} to the victim and all enemies within {ABIL_25_COM_1_RADI_FEET} of them.
Releases a searing gout of flame, dealing {ABIL_27_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to all targets in front of the Turret up to {ABIL_27_COM_0_RADI_FEET} away.

Opens the Turret's safety-release valves for up to {ABIL_28_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}, repeatedly dealing  {ABIL_28_COM_1_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE} every {ABIL_28_COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} to all targets within {ABIL_28_COM_1_RADI_FEET}.
Deals {ABIL_41_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to the target.
Deals {ABIL_42_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to all enemies in front of your War Lion, up to {ABIL_42_COM_0_RADI_FEET} away.
Reduces the autoattack speed of all enemies within {ABIL_43_COM_0_RADI_FEET} by {ABIL_43_COM_0_VAL1}% for {ABIL_43_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.

Your pet roars, interrupting any currently building abilities and forcing monsters to attack it. While taunted your opponent will take {ABIL_44_COM_0_VAL0}% more damage from your pet's attacks. This effect will fade after {ABIL_44_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Deals {ABIL_45_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to the target, and reduces their armor by {ABIL_45_COM_1_VAL0} for {ABIL_45_COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.

Deals {ABIL_46_COM_0_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} to the target over {ABIL_46_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}. For the first {ABIL_46_COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}, the target will be snared, reducing their movement speed by {ABIL_46_COM_1_VAL0}%.
Strikes the target 2 times, dealing {ABIL_47_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} with each hit.
Deals {ABIL_48_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to the target.
Deals {ABIL_49_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to the target, and an additional {ABIL_49_COM_1_VAL0_COM_0_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {ABIL_49_COM_1_VAL0_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Squig bounces on it's target, knocking them down for {ABIL_6_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Squig flings deadly spines at it's target, dealing {ABIL_7_COM_1_VAL0_DAMAGE} every second for {ABIL_7_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.

Your Squig injects a deadly poison in to it's target, dealing {ABIL_8_COM_0_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {ABIL_8_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS} and reducing their chance to critically hit by  {ABIL_8_COM_1_VAL1}% for {ABIL_8_COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Squig gores its target, dealing {ABIL_9_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and an additional {ABIL_9_ABIL_3881_COM_0_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over {ABIL_9_ABIL_3881_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Squig slams it's head in to it's target, dealing {ABIL_10_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} and knocking them back.
Your Squig sprays out corrosive slime towards an enemy, dealing {ABIL_11_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to all targets within {ABIL_11_COM_0_RADI_FEET} of the victim.

Your Squig expels noxious spores towards an enemy, briefly sickening the victim and all other enemies within {ABIL_12_COM_0_RADI_FEET} of them, dealing {ABIL_12_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE}. Any of your Squigs, including your Battle Squig, within the radius will be healed for {ABIL_12_COM_1_VAL0_HEALTH}.

Your pet squeals, interrupting any currently building abilities and forcing monsters to attack your pet. The target will take  {ABIL_17_COM_5_VAL0_TOD_DAMAGE} over  {ABIL_17_COM_5_DURA_SECONDS}. While taunted your opponent will take {ABIL_17_COM_0_VAL0}% more damage from your pet's attacks. This effect will fade after {ABIL_17_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.

Your Pink Horror flings daemonic fire at it's target, burning them for {ABIL_54_COM_0_VAL0_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} and reducing Elemental Resistance by {ABIL_54_COM_1_VAL0} for the next {ABIL_54_COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.

Your Pink Horror forces daemonic power into it's target, lowering the target's chance to critically hit by {ABIL_55_COM_1_VAL1}% and dealing {ABIL_55_COM_0_VAL0_TOD_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} over {ABIL_55_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Blue Horror spews out a cone of daemonic energy that inflicts {ABIL_56_COM_0_VAL0_SPIRITDAMAGE} to targets up to {ABIL_56_COM_0_RADI_FEET} in front of Horror.
Your Blue Horror releases a field of energy dealing {ABIL_57_COM_1_VAL0_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} every second to all targets within {ABIL_57_COM_1_RADI_FEET} for {ABIL_57_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
Your Flamer focuses two gouts of flame on it's target dealing {ABIL_58_COM_1_VAL0_SPIRITDAMAGE} every {ABIL_58_COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} for {ABIL_58_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.

Your Flamer hurls a gout of daemonic fire that will strike it's target and those {ABIL_59_COM_0_RADI_FEET} around them, dealing {ABIL_59_COM_0_VAL0_TOD_SPIRITDAMAGE} over {ABIL_59_COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}.
A melee attack that deals very high damage.
Repeatedly damages all enemies in front of you up to 65 feet away over 3 seconds, as long as you maintain your concentration.
Your entire group deals 20% more damage for 20 seconds.
All enemies within 30 feet are afflicted by the Rune of Retribution for 10 seconds, which will deal damage to them every time they use an ability.
A protective aura surrounds you, and will absorb damage for a few moments.
Increases armor and all resistances for your entire group, for 30 seconds.
Removes all hostile effects from your entire group.
Increases your chance to disrupt enemy spells by 50% for 10 seconds.

You activate the self-destruct mechanism built into your turret, destroying the turret and dealing {COM_1_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE} to all enemies within {COM_1_RADI_FEET} of it, knocking them down for {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS}.

You and your Squig attack together on each others target. You strike your target for {COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE}, and your pet strikes its target for {ABIL_18_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE}.  If you are within {COM_2_RADI_FEET} of your pet's target, you will also strike that enemy for {COM_2_VAL0_DAMAGE}, and likewise, if your pet is within {ABIL_18_COM_2_RADI_FEET} of your target, it will also strike your enemy for {ABIL_18_COM_2_VAL0_DAMAGE} as well.

You cause your pet to explode, dealing {ABIL_15_COM_0_VAL0_DAMAGE} to enemies within {ABIL_15_COM_0_RADI_FEET}.  For the next {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS}, the next different squig other than the one that just exploded will be summoned instantly.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: Your Pink Horror flings daemonic fire at it's target, burning them for {ABIL_54_COM_0_VAL0_ELEMENTALDAMAGE} and reducing Elemental Resistance by {ABIL_54_COM_1_VAL0} for the next {ABIL_54_COM_1_DURA_SECONDS}.
Strength Buff
Resist Buff
Increases your Weapon Skill by +1 per level.
Increases Toughness by {COM_0_VAL0}.
You deal 5% more damage, but your Toughness and Armor are reduced.

Increases your Weapon Skill by +1 per level.
Your Toughness and Armor are increased, but you deal 5% less damage.

Increases your Initiative by {COM_0_VAL0} per level.

You stare down your opponent, draining {COM_0_VAL0} of their Action Points into yourself, and reducing their Strength by {COM_2_VAL0} for {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS}.
Deals high damage to your target, and greatly reduces their Strength and Weapon Skill for 30 seconds.
Steals up to 200 action points from your target and gives it to you, and reduces your target's Intelligence by {COM_2_VAL0} for 30 seconds.
Reduces the Intelligence and Willpower of all enemies within 30 feet for 10 seconds. Anyone afflicted by this effect will regain action points 50% more slowly.
All enemies within 30 feet suffer very high damage over 9 seconds. Anyone afflicted by this effect will have all of their stats (except Wounds) reduced.
Increases your Corporeal resistance by {COM_0_VAL0}.
Increases your Wounds by {COM_0_VAL0}.
Increases your Spirit resistance by {COM_0_VAL0}.

Increases all of your resistances, but only slightly.
Increases your Elemental resistance by {COM_0_VAL0}.
Spiritual resistance increased by {COM_0_VAL0}.
Increases Toughness for your entire group for 15 seconds.
Increases Toughness for your entire group for 15 seconds.
Increases your group's Toughness for 30 seconds.
All enemies in front of you have their Weapon Skill, Initiative, and Willpower greatly reduced and become snared for 10 seconds, reducing their run speed by 60%.
Increases your group's armor and all resistances for 30 seconds, and restores 100 action points to everyone in the group.

You set your mind to the task at hand and focus on what must be done, increasing your Corporeal resistance by {COM_0_VAL0} for {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}. Also increases your Oath Friend's resistance if they are within {COM_1_RADI_FEET}.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: Place a pike next to the body of a fallen foe, topped with their head.

At a max of once every 6 seconds, an incoming critical hit that lands against you gains the notice of Karl Franz. After this happens 10 times, you can petition to have him summon a Comet of Sigmar at a location of your choosing.
Drops a keg on the ground at your location, from which you and others of your realm can partake to gain a temporary morale boost. Grows in size and strength after 25 and 50 uses.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: Stow your guild's Standard.
Stow your guild's Standard.
Stow your guild's Standard.
Deploy your guild's Standard.
Deploy your guild's Standard.
Deploy your guild's Standard.

You plant your guild's Standard into the ground, where it will serve as a rallying point for your party. The Standard will continue to radiate its effects while planted, and you'll be free to take other actions. Be wary, though, for hostile players can attempt to capture your Standard!
The Standard will remain for up to {ABIL_14528_COM_0_DURA_MINUTES} before falling apart.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt:
Summons a Spiked squig pet which you can order around. This pet attacks from range and has increased damage.
This pet receives a bonus to Ballistic Skill equal to 150% of your bonus from items. This pet receives a bonus to Weapon Skill equal to 50% of your bonus from items.
You gain the ability to autoattack while moving, and your chance to critically hit is increased by {COM_2_VAL1}% as long as this squig is alive.
Cooldown will begin when you lose control of your pet for any reason.

A close-range bow stance that increases your Toughness by {COM_0_VAL0} and the chance that your bow attacks will critically hit by {COM_1_VAL1}%. You gain the ability to autoattack while moving while in this stance.

You may only use a single Stance at a time.

SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt:
You focus your defenses against enemy fire, increasing your chances to dodge and disrupt by {COM_2_VAL0}% for {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS}. You will also defend all allies behind you, up to {COM_3_RADI_FEET} away, increasing their chances to dodge and disrupt by {COM_3_VAL0}% as long as they remain at your back.
This effect will end if you break your concentration, or run out of action points.
Building Grudges.
Building Grudges.
Select one groupmate to be an Oath Friend.  Any time they are attacked, you will gain Grudge.
Collecting Accusations!
